allow: Bash(python3 -m pip install --quiet fastapi "uvicorn[standard]" email-validator python-dotenv)
Bash(python3 -c "import fastapi, uvicorn, email_validator; print\('fastapi', fastapi.__version__, '| uvicorn ok | email-validator ok'\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5173/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Test User","email":"test@example.com","subject":"Hello","message":"This is a test message over ten chars."}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5173/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Bot","email":"bot@example.com","subject":"spam","message":"buy cheap stuff now!!","company":"evilcorp"}')
Bash(cp "image/AI Dermatologist — Skin Cancer Detection.png" "portfolio website/assets/img/skin-cancer.png")
Bash(cp "image/Pneumonia Identification in Chest X-rays.png" "portfolio website/assets/img/pneumonia.png")
Bash(grep -nA3 "const SKILLS|const EDUCATION|const EXPERIENCE|const PROJECT_CATEGORIES|const BLOG_CATEGORIES|const RESEARCH_INTERESTS|const CURRENT_FOCUS|const PUBLICATIONS" assets/data.js)
Bash(echo "name: $\(git config user.name || git config --global user.name || echo UNSET\)")
Bash(echo "email: $\(git config user.email || git config --global user.email || echo UNSET\)")
